title: Principal Plant Manager at Royal Enfield Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Principal Plant Manager at Royal Enfield Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Plant Manager with drive and ambition, Royal Enfield Asia Pacific Associates in Nagpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Royal Enfield Asia Pacific Associates:
Royal Enfield Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Royal Enfield Asia Pacific Associates!
